title: L71 - work_factory_portfolio
description: Portfolio management view of all work services. Provides executive-level oversight with service inventory, health rollups, capacity overview, and strategic prioritization. Enables portfolio-level reporting and resource allocation decisions.

description.description: Purpose and scope of this portfolio
examples: Portfolio of foundational infrastructure services supporting all EVA projects

owner_type.description: Type of entity that owns this portfolio

owner_id.description: Polymorphic FK to owning entity (cp_agent id, agent id, or human identifier)

service_ids.description: Array of FK to L62 work_factory_services.id (services in this portfolio)

service_count.description: Total number of services in portfolio (calculated from service_ids.length)

health_summary.description: Aggregate health metrics across all portfolio services

healthy_services.description: Count of services meeting all SLOs

degraded_services.description: Count of services with SLO warnings

critical_services.description: Count of services with active critical breaches

offline_services.description: Count of services that are unavailable

overall_health_score.description: Aggregate health score (0-100), weighted by service criticality

last_updated_at.description: When health summary was last refreshed

capacity_summary.description: Aggregate capacity and utilization across portfolio

total_requests_24h.description: Total service requests in last 24 hours

total_runs_24h.description: Total service runs in last 24 hours

average_success_rate.description: Average success rate across all services (0-1)

total_active_breaches.description: Count of active SLO breaches across portfolio

peak_load_services.description: Services currently at or near capacity

projected_end_of_month_usd.description: Projected cost at end of current month (USD)

roadmap_ids.description: Array of FK to L72 work_factory_roadmaps.id (strategic roadmaps for this portfolio)

active_investment_ids.description: Array of FK to L73 work_factory_investments.id (active investment initiatives)

governance_policy_ids.description: Array of FK to L75 work_factory_governance.id (governance policies applicable to this portfolio)

notes.description: Additional context, strategic notes, or observations
